name: Towering Cabinet
description: A multi-tiered cabinet that resembles a tower, featuring a broad base that tapers elegantly toward the top. It can be found at the Clink-Clank Krumkake Craftshop. Its unique design not only provides excellent storage capacity but also ensures a stable center of gravity, meaning the cabinet is less likely to topple over even when subjected to significant external force. "Each 'floor' has different residents. The big ones live below, and the small ones live above. It's just like a tower!" This design concept served as the blueprint for its distinctive appearance.
